ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Apr-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Geronia Pitts.

Ms. Alavi stated that she filed a declaration yesterday, that Ms. Pitts took some time to get to their office, that the order for final distribution filed on May 15, 2019 authorized the Executor to hold a $20,000.00 reserve for filing of the fiduciary taxes returns for 2019 and the Court set the status hearing for four months out. Ms. Alavi also stated that the 2019 tax forms are not out yet, that the tax year for 2019 ends on December 31, 2019, that they are not due until April 15, 2020, that they would normally wait until April of 2021 to distribute the reserve in case of an IRS or FTB audit, and requested that the status hearing be continued to April 15, 2021. Status on distribution of the reserve is continued to April 20, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to make sure that the taxes have been filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1306 Thomas Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124 (Apn: 4791/002b))
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Geronia Pitts.

The sale was confirmed at $798,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
